Wikiwiki installed

Wikiwiki installed

Home / Devlog
DevlogFor developers docstoolingmilestone

What happened

Installed Thjodann/Wikiwiki into PRISM, initialized the Wikiwiki config and record store, added npm scripts, and rendered the initial Markdown wiki plus static wiki site.

Related files

  • package.json
  • .wikiwiki/config.json
  • wiki/index.md
  • wiki-site/index.html
